source: live Alpaca paper fills, tournament.db, symbol=TQQQ, uuid-order-id only
reference: Alpaca v2 NBBO quote (feed=iex) at-or-before filled_at; mid=(bid+ask)/2

slip_bps_signed.note: buy:(fill-mid)/mid ; sell:(mid-fill)/mid ; positive = adverse / paid up

half_spread_bps.note: (ask-bid)/2/mid at fill instant = structural half-spread floor crossed

caveats: TQQQ only - UPRO/SPXL never traded live; their real spreads are WIDER (less AUM/volume).
calm June-2026 regime + market-open liquidity; stress-window spreads blow out 10-30bps+.
tiny $100 notional, fractional shares - no size/impact; a real book pushing size pays more.
16 fills is a small sample; treat as order-of-magnitude calibration, not a precise constant.
